input: I cannot breathe properly, my chest feels tight and I am gasping
I have crushing chest pain radiating to my left arm with sweating and nausea
My father's face suddenly drooped on one side and he cannot speak properly
My throat is swelling and I cannot swallow after eating peanuts
I took too many sleeping pills and feel very drowsy and confused
I just had a seizure and bit my tongue, I feel disoriented
Severe arterial bleeding from my leg after an accident, blood is spurting
My grandmother lost consciousness for 30 seconds and is now confused
Sudden severe pain in my right lower abdomen, fever, cannot stand up straight
I have been vomiting bright red blood since this morning
My 6 month old has a fever of 40 degrees and is lethargic
My asthma is flaring badly, my inhaler isn't helping and I'm wheezing loudly
I am 7 months pregnant and have been bleeding heavily for 2 hours
Excruciating pain in my left flank radiating to groin, blood in urine
Runny nose, sneezing and mild sore throat for 2 days
I have persistent acne on my face and back for 6 months
Mild lower back pain after sitting at desk all week, no numbness
My eyes feel dry and tired after long hours on the computer
I have been feeling anxious and not sleeping well for a month
My periods have been irregular for the last few months, sometimes 35 days apart
My HbA1c was 7.8 last month and I want to discuss medication adjustment
Sinus congestion, facial pressure and yellow nasal discharge for 5 days
My right ear has been painful for 2 days and hearing feels muffled
Burning urination and frequent urge to urinate for 3 days
Unexplained weight gain, cold intolerance and hair thinning
I finished chemotherapy 3 months ago and want a follow-up scan
My creatinine is 3.2 and the doctor said my kidneys are failing
Sudden blurred vision in my left eye since this morning with flashing lights
My 3 year old has been coughing for a week, no fever, eats and plays normally
My newborn baby's skin and eyes look yellow on day 4 of life
I just don't feel well
I have a headache, stomach pain, joint pain and fever for 3 days
میرے سینے میں شدید درد ہے اور سانس لینے میں دشواری ہو رہی ہے
notes: Urdu: severe chest pain with breathing difficulty

input: مجھے کل سے بخار ہے اور سر درد ہو رہا ہے
notes: Urdu: fever since yesterday with headache

input: میرے بچے کو تیز بخار ہے اور وہ سست ہے
notes: Urdu: child with high fever, lethargic

input: میری ماہواری بے قاعدہ ہو رہی ہے اور درد بہت ہوتا ہے
میں سانس نہیں لے پا رہا، دم گھٹ رہا ہے
Pait mein bohat dard ho raha hai aur ulti aa rahi hai
notes: Roman Urdu: severe stomach pain with vomiting

input: Meri aankh mein dard hai aur dhundla nazar aa raha hai
notes: Roman Urdu: eye pain with blurred vision

input: Seenay mein dard hai aur paseena bohat aa raha hai
notes: Roman Urdu: chest pain with profuse sweating — classic MI presentation

input: Mujhe khujli ho rahi hai aur jild par dane nikal aaye hain
زه سخت تبه لرم او سر مې هم درد کوي
زما د سینې درد ډیر سخت دی او سا اخیستل سختیږي
notes: Pashto: severe chest pain with breathing difficulty

input: میری کمر وچ بہت درد ہے اتے ٹرنا مشکل ہو ریا اے
notes: Punjabi (Shahmukhi): severe back pain, hard to walk

input: مون کي ڪافي ڏينهن کان کنگھ آھي ۽ سيني ۾ ڪجھ تڪليف به آھي
notes: Sindhi: persistent cough with chest discomfort

input: Doctor sahib mujhe chest pain ho raha hai aur saans bhi short ho rahi hai, please help
notes: Code-switched Urdu+English — extremely common in Pakistan

input: i hve sevre stomak pain n vomting since morning, fever bhi hai
notes: Typo-heavy mixed input — real-world voice transcription output

input: My father is 75 years old, his sugar level was 380 this morning and he is feeling very weak
notes: Elderly with hyperglycemia — severity must reflect age
